text:
私の生みの親も気になりますけど……
マトイ先輩が言ってくださった通り
ハロウィンも楽しみましょう！

……わたしが、先輩？
そっか、ハロウィンの先輩だもんね。
ちょっと恥ずかしいけど、嬉しいな。

じゃあ、マトイ先輩から提案！
トリック・オア・トリートを楽しむ
お菓子を、一緒に作ってみない？

いいですね！　せっかくですから
オラクルに味覚の革命を起こして
みんなに食べてもらいましょう！

刺激的な材料を魅力的なお菓子に変えて
ハロウィンの魔女・マジカル★シエラが
オラクルに、ミラクルを☆

ふふっ、とっても楽しそう！
というわけで、お菓子の材料集めを
手伝っても

I won't pretend I don't want to find out who
it was that created me, but maybe Matoi is
right. Let's enjoy Halloween while it lasts!

Wait, YOU'RE taking MY advice? Being on the
giving end feels all sorts of backwards, but
I guess I DO know Halloween better!

Well then! As the resident Halloween expert,
I say we should whip up some goodies
together for some trick-or-treating fun!

That's an excellent idea! In fact, I think we
should use this as a chance to spark a
culinary revolution throughout the fleet!

I, Spooky★Xiera, shall use my magic to
turn exciting ingredients into wonderful
treats for everyone! It'll be an
Oracle miracle!

Ooh, that sounds like so much fun! But first,
we need to get those ingredients! Do you
think you could gather some for us?
